fit_summary: Perfect fit for boilerplate - boutique horse ownership syndicate needs membership management, educational content, and simple e-commerce integration.

backend_routes.purpose: Manage horse roster and breeding opportunities
data_models: Horse: name (str), breed (str), age (int), status (str), shares_available (int), monthly_cost (float), description (text), images (list)
backend_routes.confidence_reason: Core feature clearly defined in must-have features

backend_routes.purpose: Handle ownership shares and member management
data_models: Membership: user_id (str), horse_id (str), shares_owned (int), purchase_date (datetime), status (str)
backend_routes.confidence_reason: Ownership membership access is primary must-have feature

backend_routes.purpose: Monthly horse and breeding updates for members
data_models: Update: title (str), content (text), horse_id (str), update_type (str), published_date (datetime), images (list)
backend_routes.confidence_reason: Monthly updates explicitly mentioned in must-have features

backend_routes.purpose: Educational content and breeding strategy resources
data_models: EducationalContent: title (str), content (text), category (str), member_only (bool), published_date (datetime)
backend_routes.confidence_reason: Educational content explicitly listed as must-have feature

backend_routes.purpose: Racing entries, results, and performance tracking
data_models: RaceEntry: horse_id (str), race_name (str), track (str), date (datetime), jockey (str)
backend_routes.confidence_reason: Racing data mentioned in data sources but implementation details unclear

frontend_pages.purpose: Display available horses and ownership opportunities
frontend_pages.confidence_reason: Core functionality for displaying ownership opportunities

frontend_pages.purpose: Member's personal dashboard showing owned shares and updates
frontend_pages.confidence_reason: Membership access clearly defined as must-have feature

frontend_pages.purpose: Monthly horse and breeding updates for members
frontend_pages.confidence_reason: Monthly updates explicitly mentioned in must-have features

frontend_pages.purpose: Educational content and breeding strategy resources
Track racing performance and entries for owned horses
frontend_pages.confidence_reason: Racing data integration mentioned but UI requirements unclear

config_updates.tagline: Boutique horse ownership with transparency and personal touch
config_updates.notes: Need Shopify integration for merchandise store, compliance pages for racing regulations

ambiguities.missing: Whether this should be embedded in the platform or just linked externally
ambiguities.suggestion: Do you want the merchandise store integrated into the member dashboard or as a separate Shopify storefront that members access via link?

ambiguities.missing: Specific regulatory requirements and compliance workflows needed
ambiguities.suggestion: What specific racing and syndicate regulations do you need to comply with, and are there any required compliance workflows or reporting features?

ambiguities.missing: How shares are priced, minimum investments, payment schedules
ambiguities.suggestion: How do you price ownership shares - fixed amounts, percentage-based, or variable by horse? Are there minimum investments or payment plans?

ambiguities.missing: How often to sync with Equineline, TrueNicks, and racing feeds
ambiguities.suggestion: How frequently should the platform sync data from Equineline, TrueNicks, and racing feeds - real-time, daily, or weekly?

recommendation: This is an excellent fit for the boilerplate - start with membership management and monthly updates features first to validate the boutique positioning. The external API integrations (Equineline, TrueNicks, racing feeds) can be added incrementally after the core membership platform is working.
